settings.text: I've been using Gummi for about a month now — game changer. I used to lie awake for hours. Now I actually sleep through the night.
settings.name: Siya M.

settings.text: Juggling work, kids, cooking — the fatigue was real. This is my third pack and I honestly wish I found these sooner.
settings.name: Naledi K.

settings.text: I tried everything. Nothing worked. Then I tried Gummi. Fell asleep within 20 minutes. I don't know why I waited so long.
settings.name: Thabo R.

settings.question: How many gummies do I take?
settings.answer: Take 2 gummies approximately 30 minutes before you want to fall asleep. Do not exceed the recommended dose.

settings.question: Will I feel groggy in the morning?
settings.answer: No. Unlike prescription sleep aids, Gummi uses natural ingredients that work with your body's rhythm — not against it. You wake up refreshed, not knocked out.

settings.question: Are they habit-forming?
settings.answer: No. All three ingredients are non-habit forming and safe for regular use. You can stop at any time without withdrawal.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Most people notice a difference from the very first night. For best results, use consistently for at least 2 weeks.

settings.question: Are they vegan and allergen-friendly?
settings.answer: Yes — Gummi sleep gummies are vegan, gluten-free, and made with all-natural ingredients.

settings.question: How do I order?
settings.answer: Order directly through our online store. We deliver across South Africa — free shipping on orders over R500.
